Detailed Description

Structure for storing analyzer's result

Member Data Documentation

SKL_MV SKL_MP4_MAP::Acc
 

Tentative value for acceleration vector

SKL_INT8 SKL_MP4_MAP::dQ
 

delta quant (used for INTER 16x8 and B-DIRECT)

SKL_UINT8 SKL_MP4_MAP::Fields
 

field dirs (used for INTER 16x8 and B-DIRECT)

SKL_INT8 SKL_MP4_MAP::Flags
 

Encoder Flags. bit 0: use field DCT

Motion vector after 16x16 full-pel search

Storage of the macroblock's final SAD

SKL_UINT32 SKL_MP4_MAP::Sad16
 

SAD after 16x16 full-pel search

SKL_UINT8 SKL_MP4_MAP::Type
 

0: skipped
1: INTRA (16x16)
INTER: 2:16x16, 3:16x8 (field pred), 4:8x8 (4v) 5: GMC (~16x16)
